my name is Simeon Shorting and my idea for these films and movies for final destination could go forever... with huge world disasters and moments in history why that happened.. different time periods and eras.. the next one could be a space shuttle... or a deep sea discovery gone wrong.. the 1920s or 30s, the 50s and 60s when work hazards and safety were not an issue..

I respect all languages but I understand Hindi because I am from west bengal (INDIA) so I Waiting for Hindi Version of the film !! ( Earlier I had only seen the English trailer, so I had a doubt whether it will come in hindi or not, that's why I request for hindi Dubbing in the comment! No, I believe in that the film is 1oo% release with hindi and so many Indian languages like tamil and telugu, but I don't know why I  was tense about it, later I come  to know that it is Coming in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu too, yea, we understand English! The dad stepping on a shard of glass and falling backwards to be a victim of the lawn mower reminds me of one of the most haunting horror movies and deaths I have never been able to shake. 

The Happening and its concept was terrifying to me. It was even more traumatic when a person turns on a mower and lays directly in front of it to rid themselves.

I am reminded in this trailer how affected I was from that scene.
And I still cannot turn away. 

I was in Junior High when the first Final Destination made its debut and it is a staple. 

Been here for every single film… so so excited for another one!!!

Lawn mower have a security. Pressing the switch button would do nothing on its own. 
You have to constantly hold on to a sort of press grip against the handle to close the circuit. 
So what we see here would never happen.
Also I don't think the kind of small model we see here would have enough force to break a strong bone, let alone the skull. 
Have a good day :)

@TheSupriest   yes it is far from practical as is every kill in the Final Destination franchise.

As a first responder…
I never say never on mower blades doing damage “they wouldn’t have the force to”  but that is in my own experience.

I am no expert…
But you might be.

While you critique every scene…

I just enjoy it.

Why watch any movie at that point?

Maybe you should try to do the same.

@mindareyes32 Oh sorry it wasn't meant to be condescending or anything. 
I mean, it sure looks that way I guess. 
No, I wanted to reassure you on the fact that you wouldn't get terminated by a crazy lawn mawer. 
I'm not an expert whatsoever. I just lawn a lot at the moment :) 
And I appreciate those movies for what they are, just fun chills and some gore. 
Have nice day!
I figured you were going to say the happening
@TheSupriest I am sorry! 🥺 It sounded like it completely and I reacted! Just a miscommunication!

We know only the first 2 films had survivors and of course they tell us Alex, Kimberly and Officer Burke died off screen later. But A.J. Cook was on the set of Final Destination: Bloodlines and it was confirmed. Devon Sawa expressed an interest in returning to the franchise in some capacity. Albeit his character supposedly died off screen as well. ( Impaled by a falling brick.)🧱 But in actuality he was suppose to return with Clear in FD 2 but wanted too much money at the time to reprise his role. 🤔💀🎥📖

Old lady had the premonition in the 1960s. So yes we get a story which began decades ago even before the first movie, probably impacted the events of the first five movies [People who almost died on the Space Needle may be related to others from Alex Browning to Kimberley Corman to Wendy Christensen to Nick O'Bannon to Sam Lawton. Crazy, right??], plane drawing in the book is probably Flight 180 and the bus hit is a homage to Terry Chaney's death from the first movie!!

DeepakKunjapur And the BBQ being a tribute and nudge to the 2nd film not to mention the logs on the truck. The nose ring guy almost gets torched by the flame at the cookout like Kevin in the 3rd film not to mention the scene at the tattoo shop and of course getting hit by a car? So which way dies he really die LOL?! 💀🔥🪵🎥
